studyName: NINDS MS and ADEM Deep Sequencing Studies

variables.name: Additional Data
variables.description: Includes information about concomitant illnesses and results from submitting lab studies.

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Age of the donor at the time of death.

variables.name: NeuroPathology
variables.description: This is a summary of the relevant neuropathology readings as provided by the collecting brain banks.

variables.name: Phenotype
variables.description: The assigned group: primary progressive MS (as identified by the brain bank source), NMO, normal control, or encephalitis. All group designations were assigned by the brain banks.

variables.name: Post Mortem Interval
variables.description: The time between death of the patient and collection with freezing of the brain specimen.

variables.name: Sex
variables.description: Sex of the donor.

variables.name: Source
variables.description: UCLA: Human Brain and Spinal Fluid Resource Center, VA Los Angeles, 11301 Wilshire Blvd., Los Angeles, CA 90073; Rocky Mountain MS Center, 701 E. Hampden Ave. Suite 420, Englewood, CO 80113; Greg Owens, University of Colorado.

variables.name: Specimen
variables.description: These numbers are the sample/subject numbers assigned by the collecting brain banks.

variables.name: Specimen Site
variables.description: Anatomic site of the specimen used in the sequencing runs.

variables.name: Year of Collection
variables.description: Year the specimen was collected by the brain bank.

variables.name: Affection Status
variables.description: The assigned group: primary progressive MS (as identified by the brain bank source), NMO, normal control, or encephalitis. All group designations were assigned by the brain banks.

variables.name: Consent
variables.description: Consent group

variables.name: Source_SubjID
variables.description: IDs used at tissue source.

variables.name: Specimen
variables.description: These numbers are the sample/subject numbers assigned by the collecting brain banks.

variables.description: UCLA: Human Brain and Spinal Fluid Resource Center, VA Los Angeles, 11301 Wilshire Blvd., Los Angeles, CA 90073; Rocky Mountain MS Center, 701 E. Hampden Ave. Suite 420, Englewood, CO 80113; Greg Owens, University of Colorado.

variables.description: Anatomic site of the specimen used in the sequencing runs.

variables.description: These numbers are the sample/subject numbers assigned by the collecting brain banks.
